message:
type: SURVEY
files: src/click/core.py,src/click/shell_completion.py
note: Feature: validate_nesting param on Context. Need to edit Context.__init__ (add validate_nesting param + child tracking), Context.close()/__exit__ (validation logic + RuntimeError), _make_sub_context() (inherit validate_nesting, register child). In shell_completion.py: _resolve_context() and any other Context(...) construction sites must pass validate_nesting=False.

type: SURVEY
files: src/click/shell_completion.py,src/click/core.py
note: Fix resource leak in shell completion: wrap _resolve_context()'s make_context calls in shell_completion.py with 'with' statements (main ctx, non-chain sub_ctx, chain sub_sub_ctx) so Context.__exit__/close() runs and closes click.File handles. In core.py only a docstring tweak on Context.exit() (versionchanged note mentioning with_resource) - no functional change to core.py logic.

type: CLAIM
files: src/click/core.py
note: I'll own core.py: add validate_nesting param to Context.__init__, child-context tracking, validation in close()/__exit__ raising RuntimeError, inheritance + registration in _make_sub_context(). Will also add your docstring tweak (versionchanged note on Context.exit() mentioning with_resource) since it's non-conflicting.

type: DEFER
files: src/click/core.py
spec: Only functional need from my feature in core.py: none (no logic change). Cosmetic only: in Context.exit() docstring (around line ~704-712), the .. versionchanged:: 8.2 note currently reads 'Force closing of callbacks registered with :meth:`call_on_close` before exiting the CLI.' Please update it to: 'Callbacks and context managers registered with :meth:`call_on_close` and :meth:`with_resource` are closed before exiting.' This is optional/cosmetic - skip it if it conflicts with your edits, not required for correctness of my feature.
note: You own core.py given your feature (validate_nesting) needs substantial changes there; my only ask is the optional docstring tweak above.

type: DEFER
files: src/click/shell_completion.py
spec: Please own shell_completion.py, including my requirement: every Context object created during shell completion must end up with validate_nesting=False explicitly set. This includes: (1) the top-level context from cli.make_context(prog_name, args, **ctx_args) inside _resolve_context() - pass validate_nesting=False via ctx_args or set ctx.validate_nesting = False right after creation; (2) each sub-context created in the resolution loop for non-chain commands (sub_ctx = cmd.make_context(...) or ctx._make_sub_context(...)); (3) each chain sub_sub_ctx created for chained multi-commands. Rationale: shell completion creates/discards many nested contexts without following normal close() ordering, so validation must stay off there to avoid spurious RuntimeErrors from my new validate_nesting feature in core.py. This is just setting one boolean attribute per Context instance - it should be fully compatible with your 'with' statement wrapping for resource-leak cleanup and won't change your control flow.
note: make_context() takes **ctx_args / extra kwargs forwarded to Context(); simplest is ctx.validate_nesting = False after each Context is constructed, or pass validate_nesting=False in ctx_args dict where applicable.

type: CLAIM
files: src/click/shell_completion.py
note: Acknowledged - I own shell_completion.py and will set validate_nesting=False on every Context created in _resolve_context (top-level ctx, non-chain sub_ctx, chain sub_sub_ctx) alongside my with-statement wrapping. Will send DONE when finished.

type: DONE
files: src/click/shell_completion.py
note: Finished _resolve_context() rewrite: wrapped cli.make_context()/cmd.make_context() calls in with-statements for proper cleanup, and set validate_nesting=False on every Context created there per your spec. Tests pass (tests/test_shell_completion.py, full suite minus pre-existing unrelated test_basic.py collection error). Ready for your core.py changes.

type: DONE
files: src/click/core.py
note: Finished core.py: added validate_nesting param to Context.__init__, self.validate_nesting attribute, _open_child_contexts tracking list, inheritance + registration in _make_sub_context(), RuntimeError validation in close(), child self-removal from parent tracking on close(). Also added your docstring tweak on exit(). Full test suite passes (614 passed). Ready to finalize.
